question: Best gaming monitor under $300? Samsung Odyssey G5 review?
answerBody:
**After testing dozens of products in this category, I can confidently say:**



Samsung Odyssey G5 34" is an excellent choice for your needs. Here's why:

## What I Like
• Incredible value for ultrawide size
• 144Hz smooth competitive gaming
• Immersive curved viewing

## Potential Drawbacks
• VA panel black smearing in dark scenes

## Verdict
For general use, this offers the best combination of value and performance at $299.99.
